svg.title: Stackwell Pennifold lockup sheet v1b
svg.desc: Corrected first-pass brand lockup family: icon mark, avatar badge, stacked primary, horizontal lockup, and StackPenni wordmark in navy, gold and cream.
svg.text: Icon-only mark — watermark and video corner bug
Avatar badge — profile size and thumbnail scale test

text.style: font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 30px; letter-spacing: 2px;;fill:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:30px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 30px;;fill:rgb(232, 184, 75);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;font-style:italic;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: Stacked primary — covers, posters, video end cards

text.style: font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 1.5px;;fill:rgb(14, 26, 47);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 700; font-size: 20px;;fill:rgb(168, 119, 24);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;font-style:italic;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: 1.5px;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: Brand wordmark — sits above the character system
